en: I got faith in you, baby I got faith in you now
ko: 널 믿어, 베이비. 지금 널 믿어.

en: And you've been such a, such a good, pleasant being
Oh, that I love you so
I, I pray to you Hallelujah
See the boy with the Stevie Wonder swag
ko: 스티비 원더 스웩을 가진 소년을 봐.

en: Ain't got a clue on the magic that he has
He's a go-getter, he's everybody's type
Making my, making my mission, make her feel alright
ko: 내 사명은, 내 사명은 그녀를 행복하게 하는 거야.

en: He's a 12 on a 10 point, rocking out to his joint
ko: 그는 10점 만점에 12점, 자기 음악에 흠뻑 빠져.

en: Just say the word cause I could sing all night
ko: 말만 해, 밤새 노래할 수 있으니까.
